name: Hamburger Barley Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart Dutch oven, brown the ground beef (I use extra-lean). Drain.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover.
5. Simmer for 1 hour or until vegetables and barley are tender.
6. Remove bay leaves.
